summary: Sales Intelligence System (Go-Live Phase 3) - All backend tests (20/20) passed, frontend UI fully functional with all KPI cards, pipeline funnel, score distribution, lead table, filters, and lead detail modal with stage controls working correctly.

backend_api_authentication.details: All 4 auth tests passed - endpoints correctly return 401/403 without token

response_fields_verified: stage_counts: {new: 112, contacted: 1, qualified: 0, proposal: 0, won: 0, lost: 0}
source_breakdown: {calculator: 54, experience_centre: 26, contact_form: 16, consultation: 5, developer: 4, direct: 3}
dashboard_stats_api.details: Returns all required fields with correct values

tests_passed: Returns leads with lead_score, assigned_to, status fields
Filter by status=new works correctly
Filter by source=calculator works correctly
Filter by min_score=70 returns only hot leads
Successfully updates lead status
Returns success=true and new_status
Rejects invalid status values with 400
Successfully assigns lead to team member
Returns success=true and assigned_to
GET returns 5 default routing rules
Each rule has name, condition, assign_to, priority
POST creates new routing rule with generated ID

activity_feed_api.details: Returns activities with lead_id, action, timestamp, by fields

tests_passed: Returns detailed lead with score_breakdown
Returns 404 for non-existent lead

elements_verified: 4 KPI cards (Total Leads, Avg Score, Pipeline Value, New This Week)

tests_passed: Click on lead row opens slide-out detail panel
data-testid='lead-detail-modal' present
Lead score displayed with color coding
Score breakdown shows Budget, Timeline, Property Type, Source, Engagement
Contact section with email, phone, date
Details section with Source, Assigned To
6 stage buttons (new, contacted, qualified, proposal, won, lost)
Stage buttons update lead status via API
Notes section shows activity history
data-testid='close-detail' button closes modal

sidebar_navigation.details: Sales Intelligence link at position 2 (after Dashboard) in admin sidebar

critical_code_review_comments: Lead scoring algorithm uses weighted factors: budget, timeline, property_type, source, engagement
Routing rules determine auto-assignment based on score thresholds and source type
Sales pipeline state stored in separate sales_pipeline collection for pipeline tracking
Frontend properly uses localStorage admin_token for API authorization
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements verified, stage update working)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing leads from 7 source collections (leads, contact_messages, consultation_bookings, experience_centre_bookings, calculator_submissions, exit_intent_leads, ai_chat_leads)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sales Intelligence System fully verified. 113 leads aggregated from 7 sources. Dashboard shows KPIs, pipeline funnel, score distribution. Lead table with filters (status, source, search). Click lead row opens slide-out detail with score breakdown and stage controls. All backend APIs working with JWT auth. Admin credentials: admin/lexa2026.
